## nsc artifact download

Download an artifact.

### Synopsis

Download an artifact.

```
nsc artifact download [src] [dest] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help               help for download
      --namespace string   Namespace of the artifact. (default "main")
      --resume             Enable resumable downloads with persistent state file.
      --unpack             Unpack the downloaded artifact (assumed to be a zip) into the destination directory.
```
